displayTitle: Classic Star Wars #05: The Serpent Masters (pt.2)
synopsis: After crash-landing their stolen Imperial ship, Luke and his new-found companion Tanith Shire are captured and enslaved by the Serpent Masters of Tanith's home planet. Artoo and Threepio are out of commission and the Millennium Falcon is light-years away, leaving Luke to find his own means of escape -- with nothing but his wit, his skill, and his trusty lightsaber at hand!
title: Classic Star Wars #05: The Serpent Masters (pt.2)
